mapper.insert: INSERT INTO houses ( host_id, name, address, price, max_guests, description, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{hostId}, #{name}, #{address}, #{price}, #{maxGuests}, #{description}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT house_id AS houseId, host_id AS hostId, name, address, price, max_guests AS maxGuests, description, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM houses WHERE house_id = #{houseId}
mapper.update: UPDATE houses SET name = #{name}, address = #{address}, price = #{price}, max_guests = #{maxGuests}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE house_id = #{houseId}
